javascript:(function(w%2Ck)%7Btypeof%20exports%3D%3D%22object%22%26%26typeof%20module%3C%22u%22%3Fk(exports)%3Atypeof%20define%3D%3D%22function%22%26%26define.amd%3Fdefine(%5B%22exports%22%5D%2Ck)%3A(w%3Dtypeof%20globalThis%3C%22u%22%3FglobalThis%3Aw%7C%7Cself%2Ck(w.Sidetation%3D%7B%7D))%7D)(this%2Cfunction(w)%7B%22use%20strict%22%3Bconst%20k%3D%60%0A%3Ahost%20%7B%0A%20%20all%3A%20initial%3B%0A%7D%0A*%20%7B%0A%20%20box-sizing%3A%20border-box%3B%0A%20%20font-family%3A%20-apple-system%2C%20BlinkMacSystemFont%2C%20%22Segoe%20UI%22%2C%20%22PingFang%20SC%22%2C%20%22Hiragino%20Sans%20GB%22%2C%20sans-serif%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A%2F*%20----%20hover%20highlight%20----%20*%2F%0A.hover-box%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%0A%20%20display%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201px%20dashed%20rgba(79%2C%20140%2C%20255%2C%200.9)%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20rgba(79%2C%20140%2C%20255%2C%200.08)%3B%0A%20%20z-index%3A%201%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A%2F*%20----%20selection%20box%20%2B%20handles%20----%20*%2F%0A.sel-box%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%0A%20%20display%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201.5px%20solid%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20z-index%3A%202%3B%0A%7D%0A.sel-label%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20absolute%3B%0A%20%20top%3A%20-24px%3B%0A%20%20left%3A%20-1.5px%3B%0A%20%20padding%3A%202px%208px%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20color%3A%20%23fff%3B%0A%20%20font-size%3A%2011px%3B%0A%20%20line-height%3A%2016px%3B%0A%20%20border-radius%3A%204px%3B%0A%20%20white-space%3A%20nowrap%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%7D%0A.handle%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20absolute%3B%0A%20%20width%3A%2010px%3B%0A%20%20height%3A%2010px%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20%23fff%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201.5px%20solid%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20border-radius%3A%202px%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20auto%3B%0A%7D%0A.handle%5Bdata-dir%3D%22nw%22%5D%20%7B%20top%3A%20-6px%3B%20%20left%3A%20-6px%3B%20%20cursor%3A%20nwse-resize%3B%20%7D%0A.handle%5Bdata-dir%3 %22panel%22)%2Cthis.propsEl%3Ds(%22props%22)%2Cthis.alignEl%3Ds(%22align-panel%22)%2Cthis.shortcutsEl%3Ds(%22shortcuts%22)%2Cthis.toolbarEl%3Ds(%22toolbar%22)%2Cthis.toastEl%3Ds(%22toast%22)%2Cdocument.documentElement.appendChild(this.host)%7Dplace(t%2Ce)%7Bif(!e)%7Bt.style.display%3D%22none%22%3Breturn%7Dt.style.display%3D%22block%22%2Ct.style.left%3D%60%24%7Be.left%7Dpx%60%2Ct.style.top%3D%60%24%7Be.top%7Dpx%60%2Ct.style.width%3D%60%24%7Be.width%7Dpx%60%2Ct.style.height%3D%60%24%7Be.height%7Dpx%60%7DsetHover(t)%7Bthis.place(this.hoverBox%2Ct)%7DsetSelection(t%2Ce%3D%22%22)%7Bthis.place(this.selBox%2Ct)%2Ct%26%26(this.selLabel.textContent%3De)%7DsetMultiSelection(t)%7Bfor(%3Bthis.multiBoxes.length%3Ct.length%3B)%7Bconst%20e%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Be.className%3D%22multi-box%22%2Cthis.shadow.append(e)%2Cthis.multiBoxes.push(e)%7Dthis.multiBoxes.forEach((e%2Cs)%3D%3Ethis.place(e%2Ct%5Bs%5D%3F%3Fnull))%7DpositionAlignPanel(t)%7Bif(t.length%3D%3D%3D0)return%3Bconst%20e%3DMath.min(...t.map(i%3D%3Ei.left))%2Cs%3DMath.max(...t.map(i%3D%3Ei.right))%2Cn%3DMath.min(...t.map(i%3D%3Ei.top))%3Bthis.alignEl.style.left%3D%60%24%7B(e%2Bs)%2F2%7Dpx%60%2Cthis.alignEl.style.top%3D%60%24%7BMath.max(0%2Cn)%7Dpx%60%7DsetGuides(t%2Ce)%7Bthis.guideV.style.display%3Dt%3D%3D%3Dnull%3F%22none%22%3A%22block%22%2Ct!%3D%3Dnull%26%26(this.guideV.style.left%3D%60%24%7Bt%7Dpx%60)%2Cthis.guideH.style.display%3De%3D%3D%3Dnull%3F%22none%22%3A%22block%22%2Ce!%3D%3Dnull%26%26(this.guideH.style.top%3D%60%24%7Be%7Dpx%60)%7Dtoast(t)%7Bthis.toastEl.textContent%3Dt%2Cthis.toastEl.classList.add(%22show%22)%2CclearTimeout(this.toastTimer)%2Cthis.toastTimer%3Dwindow.setTimeout(()%3D%3Ethis.toastEl.classList.remove(%22show%22)%2C1600)%7Ddestroy()%7BclearTimeout(this.toastTimer)%2Cthis.host.remove()%7D%7Dconst%20Z%3D%2F(%5E%7C%5B-_%5D)%5B0-9a-f%5D%7B5%2C%7D(%5B-_%5D%7C%24)%7C%5E(css%7Csc%7Cjss%7Cemotion)-%7C__%5BA-Za-z0-9%5D%7B5%2C%7D%24%2Fi%2CJ%3D%5B%22data-testid%22%2C%22data-test%22%2C%22data-cy%22%5D%3Bfunction%20D(o)%7Breturn%20Array.from(o.classList).filter(t%3D%3Et.length%3C%3D24%26%26!Z.test(t)%26%26!%2F%5Cd%7B3%2C%7D%2F.test(t)).slice(0%2C2)%7Dfunction%20B(o)%7Breturn!o.id%7C%7C%2F%5Cd%7B3%2C%7D%2F.test(o.id)%7C%7C%2F%5E%5B0-9a-f-%5D%7B8%2C%7D%24%2Fi.test(o.id)%3Fnull%3Ao.id%7Dfunction%20I(o)%7Bconst%20t%3Do.tagName.toLowerCase()%3Bfor(const%20s%20of%20J)%7Bconst%20n%3Do.getAttribute(s)%3Bif(n)return%60%24%7Bt%7D%5B%24%7Bs%7D%3D%22%24%7Bn%7D%22%5D%60%7Dconst%20e%3DD(o).map(s%3D%3E%60.%24%7BCSS.escape(s)%7D%60).join(%22%22)%3Breturn%20t%2Be%7Dfunction%20L(o%2Ct)%7Btry%7Bconst%20e%3Ddocument.querySelectorAll(o)%3Breturn%20e.length%3D%3D%3D1%26%26e%5B0%5D%3D%3D%3Dt%7Dcatch%7Breturn!1%7D%7Dfunction%20N(o)%7Bconst%20t%3DI(o)%2Ce%3Do.parentElement%3Bif(!e)return%20t%3Bconst%20s%3DArray.from(e.children).filter(n%3D%3En.tagName%3D%3D%3Do.tagName)%3Breturn%20s.length%3C%3D1%3Ft%3A%60%24%7Bt%7D%3Anth-of-type(%24%7Bs.indexOf(o)%2B1%7D)%60%7Dfunction%20j(o%2Ct)%7Bconst%20e%3D%5B%5D%3Blet%20s%3Do%3Bfor(%3Bs%26%26s!%3D%3Ddocument.body%26%26s!%3D%3Ddocument.documentElement%26%26e.length%3C5%3B)%7Bconst%20n%3DB(s)%3Bif(n%26%26s!%3D%3Do)%7Be.unshift(%60%23%24%7BCSS.escape(n)%7D%60)%3Bconst%20r%3De.join(%22%20%3E%20%22)%3Bif(L(r%2Co))return%20r%3Bbreak%7De.unshift(t%3FN(s)%3AI(s))%3Bconst%20i%3De.join(%22%20%3E%20%22)%3Bif(L(i%2Co))return%20i%3Bs%3Ds.parentElement%7Dreturn%20null%7Dfunction%20Q(o)%7Bconst%20t%3DB(o)%3Bif(t)%7Bconst%20r%3D%60%23%24%7BCSS.escape(t)%7D%60%3Bif(L(r%2Co))return%20r%7Dconst%20e%3Dj(o%2C!1)%3Bif(e)return%20e%3Bconst%20s%3Dj(o%2C!0)%3Bif(s)return%20s%3Bconst%20n%3D%5B%5D%3Blet%20i%3Do%3Bfor(%3Bi%26%26i!%3D%3Ddocument.body%26%26i!%3D%3Ddocument.documentElement%26%26n.length%3C5%3B)n.unshift(N(i))%2Ci%3Di.parentElement%3Breturn%20n.join(%22%20%3E%20%22)%7Dfunction%20tt(o)%7Bconst%20t%3Do.tagName.toLowerCase()%2Ce%3DB(o)%3Bif(e)return%60%24%7Bt%7D%23%24%7Be%7D%60%3Bconst%20s%3DD(o)%3Breturn%20s.length%3F%60%24%7Bt%7D.%24%7Bs%5B0%5D%7D%60%3At%7Df %7Bdx%3A0%2Cdy%3A0%2Cmoved%3A!1%2Cresized%3A!1%2Cdeleted%3A!1%2Ctext%3Anull%7D%3Bclass%20at%7Bconstructor()%7Bthis.records%3Dnew%20Map%2Cthis.undoStack%3D%5B%5D%2Cthis.redoStack%3D%5B%5D%2Cthis.seq%3D1%2Cthis.onChange%3Dnull%7Densure(t)%7Blet%20e%3Dthis.records.get(t)%3Bif(e)return%20e%3Bconst%20s%3Dt.getBoundingClientRect()%2Cn%3DgetComputedStyle(t)%2Ci%3Dn.boxSizing%3D%3D%3D%22content-box%22%2Cr%3Da%3D%3EparseFloat(a)%7C%7C0%3Breturn%20e%3D%7Bid%3Athis.seq%2B%2B%2Cel%3At%2Cselector%3AQ(t)%2Ctag%3At.tagName.toLowerCase()%2CoriginalRect%3A%7Bx%3As.left%2Bwindow.scrollX%2Cy%3As.top%2Bwindow.scrollY%2Cw%3As.width%2Ch%3As.height%7D%2CsavedInline%3A%7Btransform%3At.style.getPropertyValue(%22transform%22)%2Cwidth%3At.style.getPropertyValue(%22width%22)%2Cheight%3At.style.getPropertyValue(%22height%22)%2Cdisplay%3At.style.getPropertyValue(%22display%22)%7D%2CbaseTransform%3An.transform%2CbaseDisplay%3An.display%2CsizeAdj%3Ai%3F%7Bw%3Ar(n.paddingLeft)%2Br(n.paddingRight)%2Br(n.borderLeftWidth)%2Br(n.borderRightWidth)%2Ch%3Ar(n.paddingTop)%2Br(n.paddingBottom)%2Br(n.borderTopWidth)%2Br(n.borderBottomWidth)%7D%3A%7Bw%3A0%2Ch%3A0%7D%2Cdx%3A0%2Cdy%3A0%2Cmoved%3A!1%2Cresized%3A!1%2Cdeleted%3A!1%2CstartSize%3A%7Bw%3As.width%2Ch%3As.height%7D%2Csize%3A%7Bw%3As.width%2Ch%3As.height%7D%2CbeforeSnap%3AH(t)%2CsavedText%3At.childElementCount%3D%3D%3D0%3Ft.textContent%3Anull%2Ctext%3Anull%2Cprops%3A%7B%7D%2CsavedProps%3A%7B%7D%7D%2Cthis.records.set(t%2Ce)%2Ce%7Dget(t)%7Breturn%20this.records.get(t)%7Dall()%7Breturn%20Array.from(this.records.values())%7Dsnapshot(t)%7Breturn%7Bdx%3At.dx%2Cdy%3At.dy%2Csize%3A%7B...t.size%7D%2Cmoved%3At.moved%2Cresized%3At.resized%2Cdeleted%3At.deleted%2Cprops%3A%7B...t.props%7D%2Ctext%3At.text%7D%7Dcommit(t%2Ce%2Cs)%7Bthis.commitBatch(%5B%7Brec%3At%2Cbefore%3Ae%7D%5D%2Cs)%7DcommitBatch(t%2Ce)%7Bconst%20s%3D%5B%5D%3Bfor(const%7Brec%3Aa%2Cbefore%3Al%7Dof%20t)%7Ba.dx%3D%3D%3D0%26%26a.dy%3D%3D%3D0%26%26(a.moved%3D!1)%2Cx(a)%3Bconst%20h%3Dthis.snapshot(a)%3Bot )%7D)%7DapplyStroke()%7Bconst%20t%3DMath.max(0%2CparseFloat(this.strokeWidth.value)%7C%7C0)%3Bthis.host.setProps(%7B%22border-width%22%3A%60%24%7Bt%7Dpx%60%2C%22border-style%22%3A%22solid%22%2C%22border-color%22%3Athis.strokeColor.value%7D)%7DmarkFlow()%7Bconst%20t%3D%5B%22none%22%2C%22col%22%2C%22row%22%2C%22wrap%22%5D.indexOf(this.flow)%3Bthis.flowBtns.forEach((e%2Cs)%3D%3Ee.classList.toggle(%22on%22%2Cs%3D%3D%3Dt))%3Bfor(const%20e%20of%20this.layoutOnly)e.classList.toggle(%22disabled%22%2Cthis.flow%3D%3D%3D%22none%22)%7DmarkAlign(t%2Ce)%7Bthis.alignBtns.forEach((s%2Cn)%3D%3Es.classList.toggle(%22on%22%2Cn%3D%3D%3Dt*3%2Be))%7DfocusWithin()%7Bconst%20t%3Dthis.root.getRootNode()%3Breturn%20t%20instanceof%20ShadowRoot%26%26this.root.contains(t.activeElement)%7Dpopulate(t)%7Bconst%20e%3DgetComputedStyle(t)%2Cs%3Dt.getBoundingClientRect()%3Be.display.includes(%22flex%22)%3Fthis.flow%3De.flexDirection.startsWith(%22column%22)%3F%22col%22%3Ae.flexWrap%3D%3D%3D%22wrap%22%3F%22wrap%22%3A%22row%22%3Athis.flow%3D%22none%22%2Cthis.markFlow()%2Cthis.wInput.value%3DString(Math.round(s.width))%2Cthis.hInput.value%3DString(Math.round(s.height))%3Bconst%20n%3DW(e.justifyContent)%2Ci%3DW(e.alignItems)%3Bthis.markAlign(this.flow%3D%3D%3D%22col%22%3Fn%3Ai%2Cthis.flow%3D%3D%3D%22col%22%3Fi%3An)%2Cthis.gapInput.value%3DString(e.columnGap%3D%3D%3D%22normal%22%3F0%3AR(e.columnGap))%3Bconst%20r%3D%5Be.paddingLeft%2Ce.paddingTop%2Ce.paddingRight%2Ce.paddingBottom%5D.map(R)%2Ca%3Dr%5B0%5D%3D%3D%3Dr%5B2%5D%26%26r%5B1%5D%3D%3D%3Dr%5B3%5D%3Bthis.setPadMode(!a)%2Cthis.padXInput.value%3DString(r%5B0%5D)%2Cthis.padYInput.value%3DString(r%5B1%5D)%2Cthis.padSides.forEach((d%2Cc)%3D%3Ed.value%3DString(r%5Bc%5D))%2Cthis.clipInput.checked%3De.overflowX!%3D%3D%22visible%22%2Cthis.opacityInput.value%3DString(Math.round(parseFloat(e.opacity)*100))%2Cthis.radiusInput.value%3DString(R(e.borderTopLeftRadius))%3Bconst%20l%3DX(e.backgroundColor)%3Bthis.fillColor.value%3Dl.hex%2Cthis.fillPct.value%3DString(Mat opagation()%2Cthis.selected.length%3E0%3Fthis.select(%5B%5D)%3Athis.deactivate()%3Breturn%7Dif(s%26%26(e.key%3D%3D%3D%22z%22%7C%7Ce.key%3D%3D%3D%22Z%22))%7Be.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%2C(e.shiftKey%3Fthis.history.redo()%3Athis.history.undo())%26%26this.overlay.toast(e.shiftKey%3F%22%E9%87%8D%E5%81%9A%22%3A%22%E6%92%A4%E9%94%80%22)%3Breturn%7Dif(this.selected.length%3D%3D%3D0)return%3Bif(e.key%3D%3D%3D%22Delete%22%7C%7Ce.key%3D%3D%3D%22Backspace%22)%7Be.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%3Bconst%20l%3Dthis.selected.length%2Ch%3Dthis.selected.map(d%3D%3E%7Bconst%20c%3Dthis.history.ensure(d)%2Cp%3Dthis.history.snapshot(c)%3Breturn%20c.deleted%3D!0%2C%7Brec%3Ac%2Cbefore%3Ap%7D%7D)%3Bthis.select(%5B%5D)%2Cthis.history.commitBatch(h)%2Cthis.overlay.toast(l%3E1%3F%60%E5%B7%B2%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%20%24%7Bl%7D%20%E4%B8%AA%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%EF%BC%88%E2%8C%98Z%20%E6%92%A4%E9%94%80%EF%BC%89%60%3A%22%E5%B7%B2%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%EF%BC%88%E2%8C%98Z%20%E6%92%A4%E9%94%80%EF%BC%89%22)%3Breturn%7Dif(this.selected.length%3D%3D%3D1)%7Bconst%20l%3Dthis.selected%5B0%5D%3Bif(e.key%3D%3D%3D%22Enter%22)%7Be.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%3Bconst%20h%3De.shiftKey%3Fl.parentElement%3Al.firstElementChild%3Bthis.isSelectable(h)%26%26this.select(%5Bh%5D)%3Breturn%7Dif(e.key%3D%3D%3D%22Tab%22)%7Be.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%3Bconst%20h%3De.shiftKey%3Fl.previousElementSibling%3Al.nextElementSibling%3Bthis.isSelectable(h)%26%26this.select(%5Bh%5D)%3Breturn%7D%7Dconst%20n%3De.shiftKey%3F10%3A1%2Cr%3D%7BArrowLeft%3A%5B-n%2C0%5D%2CArrowRight%3A%5Bn%2C0%5D%2CArrowUp%3A%5B0%2C-n%5D%2CArrowDown%3A%5B0%2Cn%5D%7D%5Be.key%5D%3Bif(!r)return%3Be.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%3Bconst%20a%3Dthis.selected.map(l%3D%3E%7Bconst%20h%3Dthis.history.ensure(l)%2Cd%3Dthis.history.snapshot(h)%3Breturn%20h.dx%2B%3Dr%5B0%5D%2Ch.dy%2B%3Dr%5B1%5D%2Ch.moved%3D!0%2C%7Brec%3Ah%2Cbefore%3Ad%7D%7D)%3Bthis.history.commitBatch(a%2C%7Bcoalesce%3A%22nudge%22%7D)%7D%2Cthis.opts%3D%7BautoStart% D%3D%22h%22%3Fi.left%3Ai.top%3Bfor(const%7Brec%3Ac%2Crect%3Ap%7Dof%20n)%7Bconst%20f%3Dt%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fp.width%3Ap.height%2Cm%3Dt%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fp.left%3Ap.top%2Cb%3Dd-m%3Bb!%3D%3D0%26%26(t%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fc.dx%2B%3Db%3Ac.dy%2B%3Db%2Cc.moved%3D!0%2Cx(c))%2Cd%2B%3Df%2Bh%7Dthis.history.commitBatch(s)%7Dcopy(t%2Ce)%7Bvar%20n%3Bconst%20s%3D()%3D%3E%7Bconst%20i%3Ddocument.createElement(%22textarea%22)%3Bi.value%3Dt%2Ci.style.position%3D%22fixed%22%2Ci.style.opacity%3D%220%22%2Cdocument.body.append(i)%2Ci.select()%2Cdocument.execCommand(%22copy%22)%2Ci.remove()%2Cthis.overlay.toast(e)%7D%3B(n%3Dnavigator.clipboard)!%3Dnull%26%26n.writeText%3Fnavigator.clipboard.writeText(t).then(()%3D%3Ethis.overlay.toast(e)%2C()%3D%3Es())%3As()%7DgetMarkdown()%7Breturn%20U(this.history.all())%7DgetCSS()%7Breturn%20V(this.history.all())%7Dget%20isActive()%7Breturn%20this.active%7Dundo()%7Breturn%20this.history.undo()%7Dredo()%7Breturn%20this.history.redo()%7DsyncUI()%7Bthis.history.prune()%2Cthis.toolbar.update(this.active%2Cthis.history.all())%2Cthis.propsPanel.sync()%7D%7Dfunction%20bt(o)%7Breturn%20new%20G(o)%7Dw.Sidetation%3DG%2Cw.init%3Dbt%2CObject.defineProperty(w%2CSymbol.toStringTag%2C%7Bvalue%3A%22Module%22%7D)%7D)%3B%0A%3B(function()%7Bvar%20s%3Dwindow.Sidetation%7C%7CglobalThis.Sidetation%3Bif(document.querySelector('%5Bdata-sidetation%5D'))%7Bconsole.log('Sidetation%20already%20injected')%3Breturn%3B%7Dwindow.__sidetation%3Ds.init(%7BautoStart%3Atrue%7D)%3Bconsole.log('Sidetation%20ready%20%E2%80%94%20%E5%B7%B2%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E8%BF%9B%E5%85%A5%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F')%3B%7D)()%3B
